stemHtml: According to the European Regulations on Air Operations, which of the following statements is correct where more than one Cabin Crew Member is assigned?

options.a: The Competent Authority shall assign a Crew Member to be responsible to the Pilot-in-Command/Commander.
options.b: The Operator shall nominate one Cabin Crew Member to be responsible to the Pilot-in-Command/Commander.
options.c: The Pilot-in-Command/Commander shall nominate one Cabin Crew Member to be responsible to him/her.
options.d: The most experienced Cabin Crew Member shall be responsible to the Pilot-in-Command/Commander.
